0.name: Not assessed
0.description: Claimed but no evidence evaluation performed

1.name: Low evidence
1.description: Single observational study or mechanistic reasoning only
1.upgrade_from_0: At least one peer-reviewed study found
1.downgrade_from_2: Key study retracted, or major replication failure

2.name: Moderate evidence
2.description: Multiple concordant studies or single well-conducted RCT
2.upgrade_from_1: Second independent study confirms, or RCT published

3.name: Strong evidence
3.description: Meta-analysis of RCTs or consistent cross-type evidence
3.upgrade_from_2: Systematic review or meta-analysis with consistent results
